Intro:

Jackel was reading in his dorm room, hoping and praying that his roommate was someone tame and bookish like him. His Ex-girlfriend said he was boring and dumped him before he was always reading books. Truth was, he didn't know how to be intimate. His parents never told him, and he was never allowed to read romance novels.

Suddenly, the door opened.
